SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
with srProvider as
  (SELECT distinct ProviderID
       ,TaxonomyCode1
       ,FirstName
       ,MiddleInitial
   FROM Provider)
,srProviderHierarchy as
  (SELECT distinct ProviderID
       ,ProviderNPI        
       ,ProviderLastName
       ,LocationAddress1 
       ,LocationAddress2
       ,LocationCity 
       ,LocationState
       ,LocationZip
       ,LocationDesc               
       ,LocationTIN 
       ,LocationID 
       ,LocationDesc
       ,EndDate
       ,StartDate
       ,LocationIDType
       ,LocationRanking      
  FROM ProviderHierarchy)
,srProviderSpecialtyDataset as
  (SELECT distinct TaxonomyCode
       ,Use4PCPAssignment
       ,Specialty
   From ProviderSpecialtyDataset)
,rendering as 
    (SELECT ph.ProviderID providerID 
        ,cast(ph.ProviderNPI as string) providerNPI 
        ,ph.ProviderLastName providerLastName 
        ,HASH(CONCAT(IfNull(ph.LocationAddress1,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationAddress2,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationCity,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationState,'') 
        ,cast(IfNull(ph.LocationZip,'') as string))) addressHash 
    FROM srProvider p 
    JOIN srProviderHierarchy ph 
    on p.ProviderID = ph.ProviderID 
    LEFT JOIN srProviderSpecialtyDataset psd 
    ON p.TaxonomyCode1 = psd.TaxonomyCode 
    WHERE 1=1 
    AND psd.Use4PCPAssignment = 1 
    AND lower(ph.LocationIDType) = 'rendering'
    AND ph.LocationRanking = 1) 
 ,billing as 
    (SELECT ph.ProviderID providerID 
        ,ph.LocationDesc as providerOrgName 
        ,ph.LocationAddress1 providerAddress1 
        ,ph.LocationAddress2 providerAddress2
        ,ph.LocationCity providerCity 
        ,ph.LocationState providerState 
        ,ph.LocationZip providerZipCode 
        ,ph.LocationTIN providerTIN 
        ,ph.LocationID practiceUnitCode 
        ,ph.LocationDesc practiceUnitName 
        ,HASH(CONCAT(IfNull(ph.LocationAddress1,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationAddress2,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationCity,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationState,'') 
        ,cast(IfNull(ph.LocationZip,'') as string))) addressHash 
    FROM srProvider p 
    JOIN srProviderHierarchy ph 
    on p.ProviderID = ph.ProviderID 
    LEFT JOIN srProviderSpecialtyDataset psd 
    ON p.TaxonomyCode1 = psd.TaxonomyCode 
    WHERE 1=1 
    AND lower(ph.LocationIDType) = 'billing' 
    AND ph.LocationRanking = 1) 
 ,renToBill as 
    (SELECT ph.ProviderID providerID 
        ,ph.LocationID practiceUnitCode 
        ,HASH(CONCAT(IfNull(ph.LocationAddress1,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationAddress2,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationCity,'') 
        ,IfNull(ph.LocationState,'') 
        ,cast(IfNull(ph.LocationZip,'') as string))) addressHash 
    FROM srProvider p 
    JOIN srProviderHierarchy ph 
    on p.ProviderID = ph.ProviderID
    WHERE 1=1 
    AND lower(ph.LocationIDType) = 'rendering to billing') 
,addMatched as 
    (SELECT DISTINCT  r.providerID  
        ,r.providerNPI 
        ,r.providerLastName 
        ,b.providerAddress1 
        ,b.providerAddress2 
        ,b.providerCity 
        ,b.providerState 
        ,b.providerZipCode 
        ,b.providerTIN 
        ,b.providerOrgName 
        ,b.practiceUnitCode 
        ,b.providerOrgName practiceName 
    FROM rendering r 
    JOIN renToBill rtb 
    on r.ProviderID = rtb.ProviderID 
    AND r.Addresshash = rtb.Addresshash 
    JOIN billing b 
    on b.ProviderID = rtb.practiceUnitCode) 
,addNotMatched as 
    (SELECT DISTINCT  r.providerID  
        ,r.providerNPI 
        ,r.providerLastName 
        ,b.providerAddress1 
        ,b.providerAddress2 
        ,b.providerCity 
        ,b.providerState 
        ,b.providerZipCode 
        ,b.providerTIN 
        ,b.providerOrgName 
        ,b.practiceUnitCode 
        ,b.providerOrgName practiceName 
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.providerID ORDER BY b.practiceUnitCode DESC) rowNum  
    FROM rendering r 
    JOIN renToBill rtb 
    ON r.ProviderID = rtb.ProviderID 
    JOIN billing b 
    ON b.ProviderID = rtb.practiceUnitCode 
    LEFT JOIN addMatched am 
    ON am.ProviderID = r.ProviderID 
    WHERE am.ProviderID IS NULL) 
,addComb as 
    (SELECT * FROM addMatched 
    UNION  
    SELECT  providerID  
        ,providerNPI 
        ,providerLastName 
        ,providerAddress1 
        ,providerAddress2 
        ,providerCity 
        ,providerState 
        ,providerZipCode 
        ,providerTIN 
        ,providerOrgName  
        ,practiceUnitCode 
        ,practiceName 
    FROM addNotMatched WHERE RowNum = 1) 
,addDeDupe as 
    (SELECT providerID
        , MAX(practiceUnitCode) practiceUnitCode 
    FROM addComb 
    GROUP BY providerID 
    HAVING COUNT(1) > 1) 
,final as 
    (SELECT '#clientCode' clientName 
        ,providerTIN 
        ,providerOrgName 
        ,ac.practiceUnitCode 
        ,practiceName 
        ,providerAddress1 
        ,providerAddress2 
        ,providerCity 
        ,providerState 
        ,providerZipCode 
        ,providerLastName 
        ,ac.providerID 
        ,providerNPI 
    FROM addComb ac  
    INNER JOIN addDeDupe drp 
    ON drp.providerID = ac.providerID 
    AND drp.practiceUnitCode = ac.practiceUnitCode 
    UNION 
    SELECT '#clientCode' clientName 
        ,providerTIN 
        ,providerOrgName 
        ,ac.practiceUnitCode 
        ,practiceName 
        ,providerAddress1 
        ,providerAddress2 
        ,providerCity 
        ,providerState 
        ,providerZipCode 
        ,providerLastName 
        ,ac.providerID 
        ,providerNPI 
    FROM addComb ac 
    LEFT JOIN addDeDupe drp 
    ON drp.providerID = ac.providerID 
    WHERE 1=1 
    AND drp.providerID IS NULL) 
,unique as 
    (SELECT clientName 
        ,rownum2 
        ,Case When LENGTH(practiceName) >= 14 and sum(CountDesc) = sum(CountTIN) Then providerOrgName 
            When LENGTH(practiceName) >= 14 and sum(CountDesc) > sum(CountTIN) Then practiceName 
            When LENGTH(practiceName) >= 14 and sum(CountDesc) <> sum(CountTIN) and FourthSpace > 0 
            Then Concat(RTRIM(LTRIM(left(practiceName, locate(' ', practiceName, (locate(' ', practiceName, 1)) + (locate(' ', practiceName, 1)) + (locate(' ', practiceName, (locate(' ', practiceName, 1))))+1)))), ' Group') 
            When LENGTH(practiceName) >= 14 and sum(CountDesc) <> sum(CountTIN) and ThirdSpace > 0 and FourthSpace = 0 
            Then Concat(RTRIM(LTRIM(left(practiceName, locate(' ', practiceName, (locate(' ', practiceName, 1)) + (locate(' ', practiceName, (locate(' ', practiceName, 1))))+1)))), ' Group') 
            When LENGTH(practiceName) >= 14 and sum(CountDesc) <> sum(CountTIN) and SecondSpace > 0 and ThirdSpace = 0 
            Then Concat(RTRIM(LTRIM(left(practiceName, locate(' ', practiceName, (locate(' ', practiceName, 1))+1)))), ' Group') 
            When LENGTH(practiceName) >= 14 and sum(CountDesc) <> sum(CountTIN) and SecondSpace = 0 
            Then Concat(RTRIM(LTRIM(left(practiceName, locate(' ', practiceName)))), ' Group') 
            When LENGTH(practiceName) >= 10 and sum(CountDesc) <> sum(CountTIN) and locate(' ', practiceName, (locate(' ', practiceName, 1))+1) = 0  
            Then Concat(practiceName, ' Group') 
        else practiceName 
        end providerOrgName 
        ,providerTIN 
        ,practiceCode 
        ,Case When sum(CountPrac)  = sum(CountOf)  Then practiceName 
            When sum(CountPrac) <> sum(CountOf) Then concat(z.practiceName, '_', left(providerAddress1,4)) 
        else providerOrgName 
        end practiceName 
        ,providerAddress1 
        ,providerAddress2 
        ,providerCity 
        ,providerState 
        ,providerZipCode 
        ,providerLastName 
        ,providerID 
        ,providerNPI 
    FROM ( 
        SELECT clientName 
            ,row_number() over (partition by providerTIN  order by practiceUnitCode asc) rownum2  
            ,locate(' ', providerOrgName, (locate(' ', providerOrgName, 1))+1) SecondSpace 
            ,locate(' ', providerOrgName, (locate(' ', providerOrgName, 1)) + (locate(' ', providerOrgName, (locate(' ', providerOrgName, 1))))+1) ThirdSpace 
            ,locate(' ', providerOrgName, (locate(' ', providerOrgName, 1)) + (locate(' ', providerOrgName, 1)) + (locate(' ', providerOrgName, (locate(' ', providerOrgName, 1))))+1) FourthSpace  
            ,count(1) over (partition by practiceUnitCode) CountOf 
            ,count(practiceUnitCode) over (partition by practiceName) CountPrac 
            ,count(providerAddress1) over (partition by practiceName) CountDesc 
            ,count(providerOrgName)  over (partition by providerTIN)  CountTIN 
            ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY providerOrgName ORDER BY practiceUnitCode asc) rowSr 
            ,CAST(providerTIN AS bigint) providerTIN 
            ,providerOrgName 
            ,practiceUnitCode practiceCode 
            ,practiceName 
            ,providerAddress1 
            ,providerAddress2 
            ,providerCity 
            ,providerState 
            ,providerZipCode 
            ,providerLastName 
            ,providerID 
            ,providerNPI 
        FROM final) z 
     GROUP BY rownum2 
     ,SecondSpace 
     ,ThirdSpace 
     ,FourthSpace 
     ,clientName 
     ,providerTIN 
     ,providerOrgName 
     ,practiceCode 
     ,practiceName 
     ,providerAddress1 
     ,providerAddress2 
     ,providerCity 
     ,providerState 
     ,providerZipCode 
     ,providerLastName 
     ,providerID 
     ,providerNPI) 
,grpOrg as 
    (SELECT providerTIN 
        ,providerOrgName as poName 
    FROM unique  
    WHERE rownum2 = 1) 
SELECT concat(year(current_date()), month(current_date())) reportMonth ,cast(providerID as string) providerID
    , cast(clientCode as string) clientCode
    , year(current_date()) pecProgramYear, cast(providerNPI as string) providerNPI
    , cast(providerTIN as string) providerTIN
    ,providerLastName
    , providerFirstName 
    ,providerMiddleInitial 
    ,providerAddress1 
    ,providerAddress2 
    ,providerCity 
    ,providerState 
    ,cast(providerZipCode as string) providerZipCode
    ,cast(providerSpecialtyDescription as string) providerSpecialtyDescription 
    ,practiceCode 
    ,practiceName 
    ,practiceProgramType 
    ,to_date(concat('01/01/',year(current_date())),'MM/dd/yyy') practiceEngagedDate 
    ,to_date(concat('12/31/',year(current_date())),'MM/dd/yyy') practiceDisengagedDate 
    ,Case When practiceProgramType = 'RCDI' then 'New - Engaged 2021' 
        When practiceProgramType = 'PEC' then 'New - Engaged 2021' 
        When practiceProgramType = 'Enhanced Reporting' then 'New - Engaged 2021' 
        When practiceProgramType = '' then 'Not Targeted'  
        When practiceProgramType = 'Targeted' then 'New - Targeted' 
    End practiceTargetedStatus 
    ,Case When practiceProgramType = 'RCDI' then 'Yes, Participating'  
        When practiceProgramType = 'PEC' then 'Yes, Participating' 
        When practiceProgramType = 'Enhanced Reporting' then 'Yes, Participating'  
        When practiceProgramType = '' then 'No, Declining'  
        When practiceProgramType = 'Targeted' then 'Yes, Participating' 
    End practiceParticipationDecision 
    ,cast(poCode as string) poCode
    ,poName 
 FROM ( 
     SELECT row_number() over (PARTITION BY f.providerID ORDER BY f.practiceName DESC) rown 
        ,f.providerTIN poCode 
        ,f.clientName clientCode 
        ,gpo.poName 
        ,f.practiceCode 
        ,f.practiceName 
        ,f.providerAddress1 
        ,IFNULL(f.providerAddress2,'') providerAddress2 
        ,f.providerCity 
        ,f.providerState 
        ,f.providerZipCode 
        ,f.providerID 
        ,f.providerNPI 
        ,gpo.providerTIN  
        ,f.providerLastName providerLastName 
        ,IFNULL(left(p.MiddleInitial,1), '')  providerMiddleInitial 
        ,IFNULL(p.FirstName, 'Name Missing') providerFirstName 
        ,case when cast(f.providerNPI as string) IS NULL then '' 
        Else psd.Specialty 
        end providerSpecialtyDescription 
        ,coalesce(ph.EndDate,ph.StartDate) as credentialingMonth 
        ,'Targeted' practiceProgramType 
     FROM grpOrg gpo 
     LEFT JOIN unique f 
     on gpo.providerTIN = f.providerTIN 
     LEFT JOIN srProvider p 
     on p.providerID = f.providerID 
     LEFT JOIN srProviderHierarchy ph 
     on p.ProviderID = ph.ProviderID 
     LEFT JOIN srProviderSpecialtyDataset psd 
     on p.TaxonomyCode1 = psd.TaxonomyCode 
      WHERE PSD.Use4PCPAssignment = 1  ) a WHERE rown =1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t  USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.reportMonth,"")=IfNull(t.reportMonth,"") AND IfNull(s.ProviderID,"") = IfNull(t.ProviderID,"") AND IfNull(s.clientCode,"") = IfNull(t.clientCode,"")  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (reportMonth  ,providerID  ,clientCode  ,pecProgramYear  ,providerNPI  ,providerTIN  ,providerLastName  ,providerFirstName  ,providerMiddleInitial  ,providerAddress1  ,providerAddress2  ,providerCity  ,providerState  ,providerZipCode  ,providerSpecialtyDescription  ,practiceCode  ,practiceName  ,practiceProgramType  ,practiceEngagedDate  ,practiceDisengagedDate  ,practiceTargetedStatus  ,practiceParticipationDecision  ,poCode  ,poName)   VALUES (s.reportMonth  ,s.providerID  ,s.clientCode  ,s.pecProgramYear  ,cast(s.providerNPI as string) ,s.providerTIN  ,s.providerLastName  ,s.providerFirstName  ,s.providerMiddleInitial  ,s.providerAddress1  ,s.providerAddress2  ,s.providerCity  ,s.providerState  ,s.providerZipCode  ,s.providerSpecialtyDescription  ,s.practiceCode  ,s.practiceName  ,s.practiceProgramType  ,s.practiceEngagedDate  ,s.practiceDisengagedDate  ,s.practiceTargetedStatus  ,s.practiceParticipationDecision  ,s.poCode  ,s.poName)
